title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.657 - Plat not required to be filed, when
text:
60.657.  Plat not required to be filed, when. — A survey plat is not required to be filed when:
  (1)  It is of a preliminary nature illustrating ideas and intentions and not the results of a survey;
  (2)  It has been recorded under any other provision of law.
(L. 1990 S.B. 580)
